description:
EU parallel track. Low-cost Step 1 (12-page form + deck + 3min video). Grant up to €2.5M if successful.

**Outline ready:** meta/eic-accelerator-step1-outline.md
**Submit:** Rolling, batched 1st Tuesday/month 17:00 Brussels

**Human actions:**
- Create EU Login account
- Record 3-min video pitch
- Build 10-slide PDF deck
- Submit via EU Funding Portal

Can use 'intending to launch SME' eligibility at Step 1.

status.comment: Projektskizze complete (meta/ki4kmu-projektskizze-draft.md). Submit by 15 Oct 2026 after incorporation.
